title: Garlicky Creamy Middle Eastern Grape Leaves Casserole
description: A comforting, garlicky casserole packed with tender grape leaves, creamy yogurt, and fragrant herbs-perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: canned grape leaves in brine, drained and sliced

instructions: Heat olive oil in a small skillet over medium heat and sauté minced garlic until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
In a bowl, whisk together Greek yogurt, heavy cream, lemon juice, sautéed garlic, dill, parsley, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Fold in the sliced grape leaves, reserving a few leaves for topping if desired.
Transfer the mixture to a greased 8‑inch square baking dish and smooth the surface.
Sprinkle the reserved grape leaves on top and, if using, a few red pepper flakes.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden and the casserole is set.
Let rest for 5 minutes before serving. Enjoy with warm flatbread.
